prompt: Create an original fictional American-football team logo badge for Football JS. Use a centered square composition suitable for a menu badge and scorebug crop. Style: bold low-poly vector-like sports identity, clean silhouette, premium broadcast-game presentation, opaque background. No words, no text, no letters, no numbers, no watermark, no real professional or college marks, no league logos, no trademarked mascots. Team: Metro Meteors. Mascot concept: an angular meteor streak with faceted motion trails, fast and modern. Team colors: primary #2f66d8, secondary #f2f4f6, accent #dfe8f5. Candidate direction: compact meteor badge with a diagonal streak, faceted star fragments, and broadcast-sports polish. Keep the badge readable at small UI sizes, avoid complex fine detail, preserve crop-safe margins.
